raw.population: N: 228 (157 caucasian, 28 hispanic, 27 black, 3 asian, 13 other) Age: 9.8 (0.2-18) WT: 32 (6-89)
raw.objective: “to characterize the pharmacokinetics of adjunctive levetiracetam in children with epilepsy, to identify relevant covariate relationships and to evaluate suitable dosing regimens”
raw.covariates: Tested: AGE, WT, SEX, RACE, BSA, BMI, creatinine clearance, LVT dose, concomitant AEDs by category (neutral, enzyme inducer, inhibitor, combination of inducer and inhibitor) and benzodiazepines Included: Age on Ka; WT and inducers on CL; WT on Vd
raw.observations: Plots show good fit, although the use of log-scale, needed due to large differences in concentrations, could obscure issues. A significant impact of enzyme inducers is found, unlike other studies. A relationship between absorption rate and age was found, although no plausible explanation was given.
raw.dose: Single and multiple oral doses in patients
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: [Simplified model*] Ka=theta1*((AGE/10)**theta2)*exp(eta1) *exp(eta2*OCC) CL/F=theta3*(theta4**IND)* ((WT/30)**theta5)* exp(eta3) Vd/F=theta6*((WT/30)**theta7)* exp(eta4) [Full model] Ka=theta1*((AGE/10)**theta2)*exp(eta1)*exp(eta2*OCC) CL/F=theta3*(theta4**IND)* ((WT/30)**theta5)*((DOSE/500)**theta6)*((CLcr/100)**theta7)*exp(eta3) Vd/F=theta8*((WT/30)**theta9)* exp(eta4) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) *etas were not provided for this simplified model and thus the etas of the full model are used here OCC: occasion (0=first occasion, 1=second occasion)
raw.parameter_values: [Simplified model] theta1=1.48 theta2=0.277 theta3=2.18 theta4=1.22 theta5=0.753 theta6=21.4 theta7=0.898 [Full model] theta1=1.46 theta2=0.270 theta3=2.17 theta4=1.22 theta5=0.640 theta6=0.0443 theta7=0.111 theta8=21.5 theta9=0.901 omega1=1.00 omega2=1.25 omega3=0.0361 omega4=0.0361 sigma1=0.09

tested: combination of inducer and inhibitor) and benzodiazepines
covariates.raw: Tested: AGE, WT, SEX, RACE, BSA, BMI, creatinine clearance, LVT dose, concomitant AEDs by category (neutral, enzyme inducer, inhibitor, combination of inducer and inhibitor) and benzodiazepines Included: Age on Ka; WT and inducers on CL; WT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
